hero.headline: Expert Auto Repair & Maintenance in Dallas, TX
hero.subheadline: From routine oil changes to complex engine diagnostics, Ruben's Auto Repair delivers reliable, honest service you can count on.

featureSections.title: Full-Service Auto Repair for Every Make and Model
featureSections.body: At Ruben's Auto Repair, we handle everything from brake repairs and tire rotations to transmission overhauls and check engine light diagnostics. Our state-of-the-art equipment and skilled technicians ensure your vehicle gets the care it deserves.
bullets: Factory-grade diagnostic tools for accurate troubleshooting
Transparent pricing with no hidden fees
featureSections.cardBody: We'll explain every repair in plain English, show you the old parts, and get your approval before any work begins.

featureSections.title: Hassle-Free Scheduling & Fast Turnaround
featureSections.body: Your time is valuable. We offer easy online booking, shuttle service, and a comfortable waiting area with free Wi-Fi. Most routine services are completed the same day, so you're back on the road quickly.
bullets: Complimentary multi-point inspection with every visit
Digital service reminders and history tracking
featureSections.cardBody: Regular oil changes and fluid checks can add years to your vehicle's lifespan. Let us help you stay on top of maintenance.

whyChooseUs.title: Experienced Technicians
whyChooseUs.description: Our ASE-certified mechanics have decades of combined experience working on domestic and import vehicles.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: You'll receive a detailed estimate before any work begins. No surprises, just fair, competitive rates.

whyChooseUs.title: Quality Parts & Warranty
whyChooseUs.description: We use only OEM or high-quality aftermarket parts, and our work is backed by a nationwide warranty.

whyChooseUs.title: Customer-First Approach
whyChooseUs.description: We treat every customer like family, taking the time to answer your questions and explain repairs.

testimonials.quote: Ruben's team diagnosed an issue two other shops missed. They fixed it quickly and at a fair price. I'm a customer for life.

testimonials.quote: I appreciate that they always explain what needs to be done and why. No upsell pressure, just honest service.

testimonials.quote: They got my truck back on the road the same day. Great communication and friendly staff.
testimonials.author: Carlos R.

cta.headline: Ready to Experience Top-Quality Auto Repair?

servicesPage.intro: From routine maintenance to major repairs, Ruben's Auto Repair offers a full range of services to keep your vehicle running safely and efficiently. Each service is performed by skilled technicians using the latest diagnostic equipment.

services.title: Oil Change & Fluid Services
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine running smoothly with regular oil changes and fluid checks.
services.longDescription: We provide full oil change services using conventional, synthetic, or high-mileage oil to match your vehicle's needs. Our technicians also inspect and top off all essential fluids, including coolant, brake fluid, transmission fluid, and power steering fluid, to ensure optimal performance and longevity.
benefits: Extends engine life and improves fuel economy
Prevents costly breakdowns by catching issues early

process.title: Drain Old Oil
process.description: We safely drain used oil and dispose of it responsibly.

process.title: Replace Filter & Refill
process.description: Install a new oil filter and add fresh oil of your choice.

process.title: Check All Fluids
process.description: Inspect and top off all other fluids, then reset your maintenance reminder.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Most modern vehicles need an oil change every 5,000 to 7,500 miles. Check your owner's manual for specific recommendations.

faqs.question: What type of oil does my car need?
faqs.answer: We'll use the oil grade recommended by your manufacturer. Options include conventional, synthetic blend, and full synthetic.

services.title: Brake Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Restore stopping power with professional brake inspections and repairs.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your vehicle's most important safety system. Our technicians perform thorough brake inspections, measuring pad thickness, rotor condition, and fluid levels. We replace worn pads and rotors, resurface drums, and flush brake fluid to keep your stopping distance short and safe.
benefits: Enhanced safety with reliable stopping power
Reduced noise and vibration from worn components
Extended brake system life with proactive maintenance

process.title: Inspect Brake System
process.description: We remove wheels and inspect pads, rotors, calipers, and lines for wear or damage.

process.title: Replace Worn Parts
process.description: Install new brake pads and rotors or drums as needed, using quality components.

process.title: Test & Adjust
process.description: Reassemble, test brake feel, and perform a road test to ensure proper performance.

faqs.question: How do I know if my brakes need service?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or grinding noises, a soft brake pedal, vibration when braking, or a dashboard warning light.

faqs.question: How long do brake pads last?
faqs.answer: Brake pad lifespan varies by driving habits and conditions, typically between 30,000 and 60,000 miles.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnostics and expert repairs for check engine lights and performance issues.
services.longDescription: When your check engine light comes on or your car isn't running right, our advanced diagnostic tools pinpoint the problem quickly. From sensor failures to major engine repairs, we have the expertise to restore your vehicle's performance and reliability.
benefits: Fast, accurate diagnosis saves time and money
Repairs performed by experienced, ASE-certified technicians
Clear explanation of issues and repair options before work begins

process.title: Scan & Retrieve Codes
process.description: Connect to your vehicle's computer to read diagnostic trouble codes (DTCs).

process.title: Perform Tests
process.description: Conduct additional tests like compression checks, fuel pressure tests, and vacuum tests to confirm the issue.

process.title: Repair & Verify
process.description: Complete the necessary repairs and clear codes, then test drive to confirm the fix.

faqs.question: What does a check engine light mean?
faqs.answer: It can indicate anything from a loose gas cap to a serious engine problem. We'll diagnose the exact cause.

faqs.question: Can I drive with the check engine light on?
faqs.answer: If the light is steady, you can usually drive to our shop. If it's flashing, pull over and call us immediately.

services.title: Tire Services & Alignment
services.shortDescription: Keep your tires in top shape with rotations, balancing, and alignments.
services.longDescription: Proper tire maintenance improves safety, fuel efficiency, and ride comfort. We offer tire rotation, balancing, and wheel alignment services to ensure even tread wear and stable handling. We also inspect tires for damage and recommend replacements when needed.
benefits: Extends tire life and improves fuel economy
Prevents uneven wear and premature replacement

process.title: Inspect Tires & Pressure
process.description: Check tire condition, tread depth, and adjust air pressure to manufacturer specs.

process.title: Rotate & Balance
process.description: Move tires to recommended positions and balance each wheel to eliminate vibrations.

process.title: Align Suspension
process.description: Adjust camber, caster, and toe angles to ensure straight tracking and even wear.

faqs.question: How often should I rotate my tires?
faqs.answer: Every 5,000 to 7,500 miles, typically with your oil change.

faqs.question: What are signs my car needs an alignment?
faqs.answer: Your car pulls to one side, the steering wheel is off-center, or you notice uneven tire wear.

about.headline: Dallas's Reliable Auto Repair Shop Since 2008
about.mission: At Ruben's Auto Repair, our mission is to provide honest, high-quality auto repair services that keep our community safe on the road. We believe in transparency, integrity, and exceptional customer service.
story: Ruben's Auto Repair started as a small garage in East Dallas with a simple philosophy: treat every customer like family. Over the years, we've grown into a full-service auto repair shop trusted by thousands of Dallas drivers. Our team of ASE-certified technicians brings decades of combined experience, and we invest in the latest diagnostic equipment to handle everything from routine maintenance to complex repairs.

We're proud to be a locally owned and operated business that gives back to the community. Whether you're a long-time resident or new to the area, you can count on Ruben's Auto Repair for honest advice, fair prices, and quality workmanship. We don't just fix cars—we build relationships.

coreValues.title: Honesty
coreValues.description: We always tell you what your car needs and what it doesn't. No unnecessary repairs, no hidden fees.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-grade parts and follow manufacturer specifications to ensure lasting repairs.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We stand behind our work with a nationwide warranty and a commitment to get the job done right.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We support local schools, sports teams, and charities because Dallas is our home too.

contact.headline: Get In Touch with Ruben's Auto Repair
contact.subheadline: Ready to schedule service or have a question? Call us or stop by our shop in Dallas.
